tokenOrderNote: INVERTED pair: QCAD (0x23d7…) sorts before USDC (0x3600…), so token0=QCAD, token1=USDC. amount0=QCAD, amount1=USDC on deposit. The seed-fxswap-liquidity.sh seeder assumes TOKEN0=USDC and will NOT work for this pool — seed QCAD manually (approve QCAD+USDC, deposit(qcad, usdc)).
notes: Tranche-1 QCAD/USDC seed (~$10k two-sided). USD/CAD Pyth feed NOT available on Arc Pyth contract (PriceFeedNotFound 0x14aebe68), so bootstrap ratio used assumed USD/CAD=1.37. Swaps blocked until a CAD feed is pushed + wired. INVERTED token order — see tokenOrderNote. See [[project_liquidity_seeding_tranche1]].
